feedback.text: Video games are a hobby of mine, i played many life service games, but they got shut down. Without me being able to play them ever again, even though i purchased them in the first place, not rented, bought! I should own my copy of the game and should be able to play it in a singleplayer mode or host my own non commercial server after it's shutdown. For reference we can look into the Stop killing games movement, this should give anybody an idea of what i am talking about! Have a good day everyone!
